prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains specifically to the Charities Act 2011, which applies to England and Wales. Scottish charity law is governed by different legislation, specifically the Charities and Trustee Investment (Scotland) Act 2005, thus this document is not applicable to Scotland.
